What are Industry 4.0, the Fourth Industrial Revolution, and 4IR?
https://www.mckinsey.com/featured-insights/mckinsey-explainers/what-are-industry-4-0-the-fourth-industrial-revolution-and-4ir

IBM - What is Industry 4.0?
https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/industry-4-0

What is Industry 4.0?
https://www.bdc.ca/en/articles-tools/technology/invest-technology/what-is-industry-4

What is industry 4.0?
https://www.sap.com/canada/products/scm/industry-4-0/what-is-industry-4-0.html

Forbes - What is Industry 4.0? Here's A Super Easy Explanation For Anyone
https://www.forbes.com/sites/bernardmarr/2018/09/02/what-is-industry-4-0-heres-a-super-easy-explanation-for-anyone/

Oracle - What is Industry 4.0?
https://www.oracle.com/ca-en/scm/manufacturing/what-is-manufacturing/what-is-industry-4-0/

What is Industry 4.0—the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT)?
https://www.epicor.com/en/blog/technology-and-data/what-is-industry-4-0/

10 Core Components of Industry 4.0
https://www.oracle.com/ca-en/industrial-manufacturing/industry-4-components/

Unleash the full potential of Industry 4.0 with advanced connectivity
https://www.ericsson.com/en/industry4-0
